commands.repair_reason: - [P2] There is a narrow code/test repair: preserve the current secret-context fallback in the new classifier and add one regression test.; Needs attention: The updated classifier can under-mask app-password-shaped tokens in unclassified structured fields that already matched another secret pattern.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve the secret-context app-password sweep — src/logging/redact.ts:1326-1327 (sha=799199f3f053004a7738a5e8984c85fe664ea9e7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR splits Apple app-specific-password redaction into explicit credential fields, generic wordlist-classified fields, and unclassified context-anchored fields, with expanded regression tests.

PR surface: Source +383, Tests +145. Total +528 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main’s broad generic-field regex can over-mask ordinary kebab identifiers, and the updated PR-head code shows the changed decision path without needing to run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is a narrow code/test repair: preserve the current secret-context fallback in the new classifier and add one regression test.
